title: [MTR3/4]New South Wales DMU Trains
description: This resource pack adds New South Wales DMU Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![dmus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/577df0e1124171aa07c32f17517457d1feec12c8_0.webp)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds NSW Trainlink DMU Trains in Australia.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (MTR3, MTR4 Beta 13~) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

## Terms & Infos

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

R Set was transferred to[NSW EMU Trains](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtrnsw-trainlink-emu-trains) pack due to capacity adjustment

## Contents

* NSW Trainlink Xplorer DMU 
* NSW Trainlink Hunter Railcar
* NSW Trainlink Endeavour Railcar
* NSW Trainlink XPT
* NSWGR 620/720 Railcar
* NSW CPH Railmotor
